decision: Owner and review authorized the Wave-3 L-lite repin without the color-scroll rider at the measured core deltas: Bank and frozen containers unchanged; peak EXT headroom -236 bytes while post-load EXT headroom gains 734 bytes; Directory post-align headroom -8 entries; symbols +14, Namepool +182 bytes and shelf headroom +78 bytes. The color-scroll rider is final C2 freight, its diagnostic quantum remains unbooked, and no third integration attempt is permitted.
